issues.message: Final state still has unconsumed goals.
Final state has no module that generates outer pipe geometry.
One or more user-required components have no matching geometry-producing inline component.
Final open-port count does not match the intent.

next_actions: Fix PLANNING_FAILED: Planner did not return a usable next action.
Fix REMAINING_GOALS: Final state still has unconsumed goals.
Fix NO_GEOMETRY_MODULES: Final state has no module that generates outer pipe geometry.
Fix REQUIRED_COMPONENTS_UNSATISFIED: One or more user-required components have no matching geometry-producing inline component.
Fix OPEN_PORT_COUNT_MISMATCH: Final open-port count does not match the intent.
